items.title: The Hidden Reason AI Botches Your Specs (and the Layered Fix That Works)
items.description:
I adopted Spec-Driven Development expecting the AI to stop making mistakes. It wasn't that simple.

Polished specs, configured skills, a smooth process. Even so, every time I asked the AI to "build a screen," the result came back muddled: business rules ignored, inconsistencies everywhere.<

items.title: Merge Sort vs Bubble Sort — Why 800 Comparisons Beats 147 Every Time
items.description:
Most developers know Merge Sort is faster
than Bubble Sort. But watching it happen
makes the difference visceral.

The Numbers

Bubble Sort: 800+ comparisons
Merge Sort: 147 comparisons
Same 30 elements. Same result.
